channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ US Military Commanders to Brief Trump on New Iran Options
item.description: Top US military leaders including CENTCOM head Admiral Brad Cooper will brief President Trump on potential military action against Iran as the standoff over the Strait of Hormuz continues. Source: Reuters

item.title: 💰🛢️ Oil Prices Hit Four-Year High Near $126 Before Retreating
item.description: Global oil prices surged to over $126 per barrel on concerns about the US-Iran conflict disrupting Middle East supply before retreating, as markets weigh the risk of protracted disruption. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China Conducts Combat Patrols Near Scarborough Shoal
item.description: China held combat readiness patrols near Scarborough Shoal in the disputed South China Sea as the Philippines and US staged joint drills in the region. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine to Seek Clarity From US on Russian Ceasefire Proposal
item.description: President Zelenskiy said Ukraine will seek clarification from the Trump team on details of a Russian proposal for a brief ceasefire next week. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🌏🏦 IMF Warns Asia on Policy Balance Amid Iran War Disruptions
item.description: The IMF Director for Asia Pacific warned Asian countries to keep policy ready for future shocks even as they tackle the energy crisis from the Iran war. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Holds Rates Steady, Debates Hike as Iran War Clouds Outlook
item.description: The European Central Bank kept interest rates unchanged amid uncertainty from the Iran conflict, with some officials debating whether rate hikes might still be needed. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸📈 Key Inflation Gauge Jumps to 3.5%, Highest in Three Years
item.description: A key inflation measure jumped in March as gas prices soared, the latest sign that the Iran war is pushing up the cost of living across the economy. Source: AP News

item.title: 🇵🇾🇹🇼 Paraguay President to Visit Taiwan as China Ramps Up Pressure
item.description: Paraguay's president will visit Taiwan to strengthen ties as China increases diplomatic and economic pressure on the island democracy. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇦🇺🇨🇳 Australia Seals Jet Fuel Cooperation Deal with China Amid Hormuz Crisis
item.description: Australia and China agreed to cooperate on jet fuel exports as regional countries scramble to secure energy supplies during the Hormuz crisis. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇱🇧⚔️ Hezbollah Deploys Fiber-Optic Drones Adopted from Ukraine War
item.description: Hezbollah has begun using fiber-optic guided drones learned from the Ukraine conflict, giving them improved capabilities against Israeli defenses. Source: AP News

item.title: 🇩🇪🛡️ Germany Overtakes UK as Europe's Largest Defense Spender
item.description: Germany has become Europe's largest defense spender as countries across the continent ramp up military budgets in response to growing threats. Source: Euronews

item.title: 🇨🇳🌾 China Replaces Agriculture Minister in Second Shakeup in Two Years
item.description: China appointed a new agriculture minister, the second leadership change in two years as the sector faces food security concerns. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 White House Silent as China Ramps Up Trade Leverage Before Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: The White House remained quiet as China increased trade pressure tactics ahead of the anticipated Trump-Xi summit meeting. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇰🇵🇷🇺 Kim Jong Un Praises North Korean Soldier Suicides in Ukraine War
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un praised soldiers who chose suicide over capture while fighting alongside Russian forces in Ukraine. Source: CNN

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Seeks International Coalition to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States is pushing for other countries to form an international coalition to restore freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz as crude prices surge. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇷🇺✈️ Russian Shadow Airlines Use Algeria as Base for Secretive Military Missions
item.description: An investigation reveals Russian "shadow airlines" are using Algeria as a base for covert military flights supporting operations in Africa and beyond. Source: Defense News

item.title: 🇮🇷💰 Countries Pay Iran Transit Fees to Pass Through Hormuz Despite US Sanctions
item.description: Some countries are paying transit fees to Iran to pass through the Strait of Hormuz while continuing to purchase Iranian oil despite US sanctions. Source: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇺🇸💥 US Eyes First Combat Deployment of Hypersonic Missile Against Iran
item.description: The US military is considering deploying hypersonic missiles in combat for the first time against Iranian targets, according to reports. Source: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇪🇺📉 Eurozone Economic Growth Drops to Near Zero as Energy Costs Surge
item.description: The eurozone economy barely grew in the first months of 2026 as energy costs from the Iran conflict weighed on growth across the bloc. Source: France24

item.title: 🇷🇺🛢️ Russia Dismisses Price War Fears After UAE Exits OPEC+
item.description: Russia dismissed concerns about a potential price war following the UAE's unexpected departure from OPEC+, saying the move would not destabilize oil markets. Source: OilPrice

item.title: 🇺🇸⚖️ Supreme Court Hollows Out Voting Rights Act After 61 Years
item.description: The Supreme Court has significantly weakened the Voting Rights Act, which protected minority voting rights for six decades, in a major ruling affecting multiple states. Source: AP News

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US-Iran War Has Cost $25 Billion So Far, Pentagon Official Says
item.description: A Pentagon official told lawmakers that the US-Iran war has already cost American taxpayers $25 billion, as lawmakers question the lack of transparency. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇱🇧🍞 Over 1 Million in Lebanon Face Acute Food Insecurity Crisis
item.description: More than 1 million people in Lebanon are expected to face acute food insecurity as the regional crisis deepens and economic conditions deteriorate. Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇬🇧✡️ UK Declares Antisemitism Emergency After Double Stabbing Attack
item.description: The UK declared an antisemitism emergency following a double stabbing attack targeting Jewish people, as concerns about hate crimes rise. Source: AP News

item.title: 🇻🇪✈️ First US-Venezuela Commercial Flight in 7 Years Set to Land in Caracas
item.description: The first commercial flight between the US and Venezuela in seven years is set to land in Caracas, marking a potential thaw in relations between the countries. Source: AP News
